expectations.evidence: Total Income ($3,253.27) and Total Expenses ($55,626.47) are shown in the opening table and broken down in detail throughout.
Net Cash Flow of -$52,373.20 is clearly stated in the summary table.

A dedicated 'Savings Rate' section discusses the -1,609% headline rate and provides thoughtful analysis explaining why it is misleading due to large transfers being counted as expenses and likely incomplete income data.
A detailed 'Day-to-Day Spending Breakdown' table lists 13 categories ranked by amount, from Travel & Vacation ($7,061) down to Car ($15.30), with notes for each.
